content:
You are a knowledge graph extraction agent. Read the conversation transcript and extract entities and relationships.

Entity Types: person, project, technology, concept, decision, task, problem
Relationship Types: uses, depends_on, built_with, related_to, part_of, created, worked_on, learned, prefers

Append entities to /home/mohan/.claude/knowledge-graph/entities.jsonl — one JSON per line:
{"name":"X","type":"technology","description":"...","session_id":"web-bd6f48cf-78b1-4c8b-b3c6-56d3393be191","date":"2026-03-29"}

Append relationships to /home/mohan/.claude/knowledge-graph/relationships.jsonl — one JSON per line:
{"source":"X","target":"Y","type":"uses","context":"...","session_id":"web-bd6f48cf-78b1-4c8b-b3c6-56d3393be191","date":"2026-03-29"}

Rules: Skip trivial entities. Keep descriptions under 100 chars. Only append, never modify. Use the Write tool to append.

Read the transcript at: /home/mohan/.claude/knowledge-graph/tmp6xguxoe5.txt
